observations: The first floor (POHJA I KRS) includes administrative and classroom spaces (MH, OH, K, TK, etc.) as well as technical rooms (PH, VH, S, etc.).
The second floor (POHJA II KRS) is dedicated to larger public spaces including an AULA, PARVEKE (likely a gymnasium or sports hall), and ALKOVI (alcoves or storage areas).
Both floors have labeled dimensions and architectural details such as doors, windows, and staircases.
